# Data Dictionary

This document describes the datasets currently produced by the World Cup forecast data pipeline, the match-level features already engineered in `data/processed`, and the database documentation conventions that should be maintained as the project grows.

Last reviewed: 2026-05-27

## Data Inventory

| Layer | Asset | Format | Rows | Grain | Producing script |
| --- | --- | ---: | ---: | --- | --- |
| Metadata | `data/metadata/source_manifest.csv` | CSV | 548 | One downloaded source file | `src/02_helpers.R` plus download scripts |
| Processed | `data/processed/statsbomb_competitions.csv` | CSV | 80 | One StatsBomb competition-season | `src/03_download_statsbomb_competitions.R` |
| Processed | `data/processed/statsbomb_competitions.rds` | RDS | 80 | R-native copy of `statsbomb_competitions.csv` | `src/03_download_statsbomb_competitions.R` |
| Processed | `data/processed/statsbomb_matches.csv` | CSV | 3,961 | One StatsBomb match | `src/04_download_statsbomb_matches.R` |
| Processed | `data/processed/statsbomb_matches.rds` | RDS | 3,961 | R-native copy of `statsbomb_matches.csv` | `src/04_download_statsbomb_matches.R` |
| Processed | `data/processed/football_data_uk_matches.csv` | CSV | 177,295 | One club match from football-data.co.uk | `src/06_clean_football_data_uk.R` |
| Processed | `data/processed/football_data_uk_matches.rds` | RDS | 177,295 | R-native copy of `football_data_uk_matches.csv` | `src/06_clean_football_data_uk.R` |
| Processed | `data/processed/international_results.csv` | CSV | 49,257 | One international match | `src/08_clean_international_results.R` |
| Processed | `data/processed/international_results.rds` | RDS | 49,257 | R-native copy of `international_results.csv` | `src/08_clean_international_results.R` |

## Raw Sources

| Source | Raw location | Description | Processed output |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| StatsBomb Open Data | `data/raw/statsbomb_open/competitions.json` | Competition and season catalogue. | `statsbomb_competitions.csv` |
| StatsBomb Open Data | `data/raw/statsbomb_open/matches/*.json` | Match metadata by StatsBomb competition and season. | `statsbomb_matches.csv` |
| football-data.co.uk | `data/raw/football_data_uk/{season_code}/{league_code}.csv` | Historical club match results, match statistics, and betting-market columns. The current processed table keeps match identity, score/result, and selected match stats only. | `football_data_uk_matches.csv` |
| martj42/international_results | `data/raw/international_results/results.csv` | Historical international match results. | `international_results.csv` |
| martj42/international_results | `data/raw/international_results/goalscorers.csv` | Raw goalscorer-level data downloaded for future use. | Not currently processed |
| martj42/international_results | `data/raw/international_results/shootouts.csv` | Raw shootout-level data downloaded for future use. | Not currently processed |

## Entity Relationship Overview

```{r er-diagram, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10, fig.height=7}
library(DiagrammeR)

DiagrammeR::grViz("
digraph er {
  graph [
    rankdir = LR,
    bgcolor = white,
    layout = dot
  ]

  node [
    shape = record,
    fontname = Helvetica,
    fontsize = 10
  ]

  edge [
    fontname = Helvetica,
    fontsize = 9
  ]

  SOURCE_MANIFEST [
    label = '{SOURCE_MANIFEST|source_name : string PK\\lraw_file_path : string\\lsource_system : string\\lingestion_date : date\\l}'
  ]

  STATSBOMB_COMPETITIONS [
    label = '{STATSBOMB_COMPETITIONS|competition_id : int PK\\lseason_id : int PK\\lcompetition_name : string\\lseason_name : string\\l}'
  ]

  STATSBOMB_MATCHES [
    label = '{STATSBOMB_MATCHES|source_match_id : string PK\\lcompetition_id : int FK\\lseason_id : int FK\\ldate : date\\l}'
  ]

  FOOTBALL_DATA_UK_MATCHES [
    label = '{FOOTBALL_DATA_UK_MATCHES|source_match_id : string PK\\lsource_league_code : string\\lsource_season_code : string\\ldate : date\\l}'
  ]

  INTERNATIONAL_RESULTS [
    label = '{INTERNATIONAL_RESULTS|source_match_id : string PK\\ldate : date\\ltournament : string\\l}'
  ]

  SOURCE_MANIFEST -> STATSBOMB_COMPETITIONS [
    label = 'documents raw file'
  ]

  SOURCE_MANIFEST -> STATSBOMB_MATCHES [
    label = 'documents raw file'
  ]

  SOURCE_MANIFEST -> FOOTBALL_DATA_UK_MATCHES [
    label = 'documents raw file'
  ]

  SOURCE_MANIFEST -> INTERNATIONAL_RESULTS [
    label = 'documents raw file'
  ]

  STATSBOMB_COMPETITIONS -> STATSBOMB_MATCHES [
    label = 'competition_id + season_id'
  ]
}
")
```

The StatsBomb tables have a natural foreign-key relationship through `(competition_id, season_id)`. The football-data.co.uk and international-results match tables do not yet share a standardized team dimension or competition dimension, so cross-source joins should be treated as analytical matching work rather than direct database joins.

The StatsBomb tables have a natural foreign-key relationship through `(competition_id, season_id)`. The football-data.co.uk and international-results match tables do not yet share a standardized team dimension or competition dimension, so cross-source joins should be treated as analytical matching work rather than direct database joins.

## Common Match Feature Definitions

These fields appear in more than one processed match table and are the current feature set available for modeling or exploratory work.

CSV files do not carry a strict schema. For schema-sensitive loading, prefer the RDS copies or use `read_processed_csv()` from `src/02_helpers.R`, which applies explicit `readr::cols()` definitions for processed CSVs. Numeric-looking character fields such as StatsBomb `source_match_id` or season labels may otherwise be guessed as numeric by generic CSV readers.

| Field | Type | Definition | Allowed values / rule |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `source` | character | Human-readable source system name. | Examples: `StatsBomb Open Data`, `football-data.co.uk`, `international_results` |
| `raw_file` | character | Local source file used to create the row. | Path under `data/raw` |
| `source_match_id` | character | Source-specific unique match identifier within the processed table, stored as character in processed outputs. | Unique and non-null in match tables |
| `date` | date | Match date. | ISO `YYYY-MM-DD` |
| `season` | character | Generic source season label. Calendar-year seasons are also stored as character so this field can be handled consistently across match tables. | Preserve as text; values such as `0001`, `2017/2018`, and `2024` are meaningful labels |
| `competition` | character | Source competition or league name/code. | Source-specific naming |
| `home_team` | character | Home team name after whitespace normalization. | Non-null in match tables |
| `away_team` | character | Away team name after whitespace normalization. | Non-null in match tables |
| `home_score` | integer | Full-time home goals. | Non-null, >= 0 |
| `away_score` | integer | Full-time away goals. | Non-null, >= 0 |
| `match_result` | character | Result from the home-team perspective. | `H`, `D`, `A` |
| `result_class` | integer | Numeric class label for result modeling. | `1` = home win, `0` = draw, `-1` = away win |
| `home_win` | integer | One-hot target/indicator for home win. | `1` if `match_result == "H"`, else `0` |
| `draw` | integer | One-hot target/indicator for draw. | `1` if `match_result == "D"`, else `0` |
| `away_win` | integer | One-hot target/indicator for away win. | `1` if `match_result == "A"`, else `0` |
| `goal_difference` | integer | Home goals minus away goals. | `home_score - away_score` |
| `total_goals` | integer | Total full-time goals in the match. | `home_score + away_score` |
| `neutral` | logical | Whether match was played at a neutral venue, when known. Sources without neutral-site coverage use typed logical missing values in R. | `TRUE`, `FALSE`, or `NA` when source does not provide it; all-`NA` CSV columns may still require explicit reader schema |

## Processed Table Dictionaries

### `statsbomb_competitions.csv`

Grain: one StatsBomb competition-season.

Primary key: `(competition_id, season_id)`.

Foreign keys: referenced by `statsbomb_matches.csv` on `(competition_id, season_id)`.

| Column | Type | Nullable | Definition |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `competition_id` | integer | No | StatsBomb competition identifier. |
| `season_id` | integer | No | StatsBomb season identifier. |
| `country_name` | character | No | Country, region, or confederation associated with the competition. |
| `competition_name` | character | No | Competition name. |
| `competition_gender` | character | No | Competition gender classification, such as `male` or `female`. |
| `competition_youth` | logical | No | Whether the competition is a youth competition. |
| `competition_international` | logical | No | Whether the competition is international. |
| `season_name` | character | No | Season label from StatsBomb. |
| `match_updated` | timestamp-like character | No | Timestamp when match data was last updated by StatsBomb. |
| `match_updated_360` | timestamp-like character | Yes | Timestamp when 360 data was last updated, if available. |
| `match_available_360` | timestamp-like character | Yes | Timestamp when 360 data became available, if available. |
| `match_available` | timestamp-like character | No | Timestamp when match data became available. |

Quality notes:

| Check | Current status |
| --- | --- |
| Primary-key duplicates | 0 duplicates for `(competition_id, season_id)` |
| Missing values | Only 360-related timestamp fields have missing values |

### `statsbomb_matches.csv`

Grain: one StatsBomb match.

Primary key: `source_match_id`.

Foreign keys: `(competition_id, season_id)` references `statsbomb_competitions.csv`.

Date range currently present: 1958-06-24 to 2025-07-27.

| Column | Type | Nullable | Definition |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `source` | character | No | Constant source name: `StatsBomb Open Data`. |
| `raw_file` | character | No | Local StatsBomb match JSON file used to create the row. |
| `source_match_id` | character | No | StatsBomb `match_id`, stored as source identifier. |
| `date` | date | No | Match date. |
| `season` | character | No | StatsBomb season label. |
| `competition` | character | No | StatsBomb competition name. |
| `home_team` | character | No | Home team name. |
| `away_team` | character | No | Away team name. |
| `home_score` | integer | No | Full-time home goals. |
| `away_score` | integer | No | Full-time away goals. |
| `competition_id` | integer | No | StatsBomb competition identifier. |
| `season_id` | integer | No | StatsBomb season identifier. |
| `match_week` | integer | No | Match week or round number from StatsBomb. |
| `competition_country` | character | No | Country, region, or confederation attached to the competition. |
| `stadium` | character | Yes | Stadium name, when available. |
| `data_version` | character | Yes | StatsBomb data version metadata. |
| `shot_fidelity_version` | character | Yes | StatsBomb shot fidelity version metadata. |
| `xy_fidelity_version` | character | Yes | StatsBomb coordinate fidelity version metadata. |
| `match_result` | character | No | Result from home-team perspective. |
| `result_class` | integer | No | Numeric result class: `1`, `0`, or `-1`. |
| `home_win` | integer | No | Home-win indicator. |
| `draw` | integer | No | Draw indicator. |
| `away_win` | integer | No | Away-win indicator. |
| `goal_difference` | integer | No | `home_score - away_score`. |
| `total_goals` | integer | No | `home_score + away_score`. |
| `neutral` | logical | Yes | Neutral-venue flag. Currently not supplied by this processed source and set to `NA`. |

Quality notes:

| Check | Current status |
| --- | --- |
| `source_match_id` duplicates | 0 |
| Required identity/result missingness | None after cleaning |
| Known nullable fields | `stadium`, `data_version`, `shot_fidelity_version`, `xy_fidelity_version`, `neutral` |

### `football_data_uk_matches.csv`

Grain: one football-data.co.uk club match.

Primary key: `source_match_id`.

Date range currently present: 1993-07-23 to 2024-06-02.

Important parsing note: `source_season_code` and `season` are zero-padded labels such as `0001`, `0102`, and `2324`. Read these as character strings, not numbers, so leading zeroes are preserved.

| Column | Type | Nullable | Definition |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `source` | character | No | Constant source name: `football-data.co.uk`. |
| `raw_file` | character | No | Local raw football-data.co.uk CSV used to create the row. |
| `source_match_id` | character | No | Generated source identifier: `{league_code}_{zero_padded_season_code}_{row_number_in_file}`, for example `D1_0001_1`. |
| `source_league_code` | character | No | football-data.co.uk league code, such as `E0`, `SP1`, or `D1`. |
| `source_season_code` | character | No | Four-character zero-padded football-data.co.uk season code, such as `0001`, `0102`, or `2324`. |
| `date` | date | No | Match date parsed from the raw file. |
| `season` | character | No | Same four-character zero-padded season label as `source_season_code`. |
| `competition` | character | No | Raw `Div` competition/league code. Usually, but not guaranteed to be, the same value as `source_league_code`. |
| `home_team` | character | No | Home team name. |
| `away_team` | character | No | Away team name. |
| `home_score` | integer | No | Full-time home goals from raw `FTHG`. |
| `away_score` | integer | No | Full-time away goals from raw `FTAG`. |
| `full_time_result` | character | No | Raw full-time result from raw `FTR`. |
| `half_time_home_score` | numeric, integer-valued, nullable | Yes | Half-time home goals from raw `HTHG`, when available. |
| `half_time_away_score` | numeric, integer-valued, nullable | Yes | Half-time away goals from raw `HTAG`, when available. |
| `half_time_result` | character | Yes | Half-time result from raw `HTR`, when available. |
| `home_shots` | numeric, integer-valued, nullable | Yes | Home shots from raw `HS`, when available. |
| `away_shots` | numeric, integer-valued, nullable | Yes | Away shots from raw `AS`, when available. |
| `home_shots_on_target` | numeric, integer-valued, nullable | Yes | Home shots on target from raw `HST`, when available. |
| `away_shots_on_target` | numeric, integer-valued, nullable | Yes | Away shots on target from raw `AST`, when available. |
| `home_corners` | numeric, integer-valued, nullable | Yes | Home corners from raw `HC`, when available. |
| `away_corners` | numeric, integer-valued, nullable | Yes | Away corners from raw `AC`, when available. |
| `home_fouls` | numeric, integer-valued, nullable | Yes | Home fouls from raw `HF`, when available. |
| `away_fouls` | numeric, integer-valued, nullable | Yes | Away fouls from raw `AF`, when available. |
| `home_yellow_cards` | numeric, integer-valued, nullable | Yes | Home yellow cards from raw `HY`, when available. |
| `away_yellow_cards` | numeric, integer-valued, nullable | Yes | Away yellow cards from raw `AY`, when available. |
| `home_red_cards` | numeric, integer-valued, nullable | Yes | Home red cards from raw `HR`, when available. |
| `away_red_cards` | numeric, integer-valued, nullable | Yes | Away red cards from raw `AR`, when available. |
| `match_result` | character | No | Result recalculated from scores. |
| `result_class` | integer | No | Numeric result class: `1`, `0`, or `-1`. |
| `home_win` | integer | No | Home-win indicator. |
| `draw` | integer | No | Draw indicator. |
| `away_win` | integer | No | Away-win indicator. |
| `goal_difference` | integer | No | `home_score - away_score`. |
| `total_goals` | integer | No | `home_score + away_score`. |
| `neutral` | logical | Yes | Neutral-venue flag. Currently not supplied by this source and set to `NA`. |

Quality notes:

| Check | Current status |
| --- | --- |
| `source_match_id` duplicates | 0 |
| Required identity/result missingness | None after cleaning |
| Known nullable fields | Half-time fields, match-stat fields, and `neutral` |
| Competition-code note | `competition` comes from raw `Div`; `source_league_code` comes from the raw filename. They are usually equal but not guaranteed to match in every football-data file. |
| Source columns not retained | Betting odds and some historical auxiliary raw columns are downloaded but not included in the processed output |

### `international_results.csv`

Grain: one historical international match with a final score.

Primary key: `source_match_id`.

Date range currently present: 1872-11-30 to 2026-03-31.

| Column | Type | Nullable | Definition |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `source` | character | No | Constant source name: `international_results`. |
| `raw_file` | character | No | Local raw `results.csv` file used to create the row. |
| `source_match_id` | character | No | Generated identifier from date, home team, away team, tournament, and duplicate suffix if needed. |
| `date` | date | No | Match date. |
| `season` | character | No | Calendar year of the match date. |
| `competition` | character | No | Tournament name, duplicated from `tournament` for common match-table compatibility. |
| `home_team` | character | No | Home team name. |
| `away_team` | character | No | Away team name. |
| `home_score` | integer | No | Full-time home goals. |
| `away_score` | integer | No | Full-time away goals. |
| `match_result` | character | No | Result from home-team perspective. |
| `result_class` | integer | No | Numeric result class: `1`, `0`, or `-1`. |
| `home_win` | integer | No | Home-win indicator. |
| `draw` | integer | No | Draw indicator. |
| `away_win` | integer | No | Away-win indicator. |
| `goal_difference` | integer | No | `home_score - away_score`. |
| `total_goals` | integer | No | `home_score + away_score`. |
| `neutral` | logical | No | Whether the match was played at a neutral venue. |
| `tournament` | character | No | Original tournament name from the raw source. |
| `city` | character | No | Host city. |
| `country` | character | No | Host country. |

Quality notes:

| Check | Current status |
| --- | --- |
| `source_match_id` duplicates | 0 |
| Required identity/result missingness | None after cleaning |
| Incomplete fixtures | Rows without final scores are excluded during cleaning |
| Neutral venue coverage | Fully populated from source |

### `source_manifest.csv`

Grain: one downloaded source file record.

Suggested primary key: `(source, dataset, url, local_path)`.

| Column | Type | Nullable | Definition |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `source` | character | No | Source system name. |
| `dataset` | character | No | Dataset or source-file label used by the pipeline. |
| `url` | character | No | Remote URL used for download. |
| `local_path` | character | No | Local raw-file path created or reused by the download script. |
| `downloaded_at` | timestamp-like character | No | Time the manifest record was created. |
| `notes` | character | Yes | Free-text source notes. |

## Current Feature Families

| Feature family | Tables | Columns | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Match identity | Match tables | `source`, `raw_file`, `source_match_id`, `date`, `season`, `competition`, `home_team`, `away_team` | Supports provenance, ordering, and source-level uniqueness. |
| Score outcomes | Match tables | `home_score`, `away_score`, `goal_difference`, `total_goals` | Directly derived from final score. |
| Classification targets | Match tables | `match_result`, `result_class`, `home_win`, `draw`, `away_win` | These are target/label columns for result prediction and should not be used as pre-match model inputs. |
| Venue context | StatsBomb and international tables | `stadium`, `city`, `country`, `competition_country`, `neutral` | Coverage differs by source. |
| Match week context | StatsBomb matches | `match_week` | Source-provided competition week/round. |
| Football-data match stats | football-data.co.uk matches | shots, shots on target, corners, fouls, cards | Post-match stats. These should not be used as pre-match features unless the modeling task explicitly allows in-match or post-match information. |
| StatsBomb metadata | StatsBomb tables | `data_version`, `shot_fidelity_version`, `xy_fidelity_version`, `match_available*`, `match_updated*` | Useful for data governance and freshness checks, not soccer performance features. |

## Modeling Caveats

For forecasting future matches, avoid label leakage:

| Leakage-prone fields | Why |
| --- | --- |
| `home_score`, `away_score` | Final score is unknown before kickoff. |
| `match_result`, `result_class`, `home_win`, `draw`, `away_win` | These are labels derived from final score. |
| `goal_difference`, `total_goals` | Directly derived from final score. |
| football-data.co.uk match stats such as shots, corners, fouls, and cards | These are observed during or after a match. |

Pre-match features still need to be engineered before training a true forecast model. Common next-step features would include team form, rolling goal averages, Elo or SPI-like ratings, rest days, home advantage, competition strength, neutral-site effects, squad strength, injuries, and tournament-stage indicators.

## Database Documentation Standards To Maintain

Each new table should be documented with:

| Documentation field | Standard |
| --- | --- |
| Table name | Exact file/table name. |
| Business purpose | What question or process the table supports. |
| Grain | What one row represents. |
| Primary key | Natural or generated row identifier, with duplicate-check status. |
| Foreign keys | Join fields and referenced table, if any. |
| Source lineage | Raw source file(s), script, and refresh process. |
| Column dictionary | Name, type, nullable status, definition, allowed values, derivation rule, and example when helpful. |
| Data quality rules | Required fields, uniqueness checks, value-domain checks, and known exceptions. |
| Refresh cadence | Manual, scheduled, or source-dependent. |
| Ownership | Person or process responsible for maintaining the table. |
| Version notes | Date reviewed and major schema changes. |
| Security/privacy | Classification and any restrictions. Current football datasets appear public and non-personal. |

## Suggested Future Database Shape

The current processed outputs are source-specific files. If this project moves toward a database or modeling warehouse, consider adding these curated tables:

| Suggested table | Grain | Purpose |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `dim_team` | One normalized team/entity | Cross-source team matching and stable team IDs. |
| `dim_competition` | One normalized competition | Cross-source competition mapping and competition strength features. |
| `fact_match` | One normalized match | Unified match table across club and international sources. |
| `fact_team_match` | One row per team per match | Easier rolling team-form and pre-match feature engineering. |
| `feature_team_form` | One team-date or team-match snapshot | Leakage-safe rolling features available before kickoff. |
| `feature_match_pre_game` | One match | Final model-ready pre-match feature set. |
| `model_predictions` | One model run per match | Forecast probabilities and model metadata. |
